detail: Created themes.ts with 4 environment themes: Holodeck, Deep Void, Neon Arcade, Crystal Cave
Refactored environment.ts with theme system, starfield for Deep Void, crystals for Crystal Cave, neon signs for Arcade
Added 3 new target types: Shrinking, Phantom, Armored with unique mechanics and scoring bonuses
Added Zen Mode: infinite arrows, no wind, no pressure — relaxation game mode
Created stats.uikitml — 9th PanelUI panel for lifetime career/precision/record stats
Updated modes.uikitml with Zen mode button, settings.uikitml with theme picker, title.uikitml with Stats button
Updated UIManager: stats population, theme label updates, zen mode HUD display
Added 5 new achievements (30 total) with target-type specific tracking
Integrated new target types into Endurance (Shrinking+Phantom) and Time Attack (Armored) modes
TypeScript compilation clean, Vite build successful, 9 uikitml templates compiled
Committed and pushed to main, deployed v1.2 to gh-pages
